title: Japanese Nectarine Salad
description: A refreshing and light salad combining the sweetness of nectarines with the freshness of silky ingredients, perfect for a warm Japanese evening.
instructions: 1. In a large saucepan, combine the soup stock and diced nectarines. Cook over medium heat until the nectarines are tender.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sesame oil and honey to make the dressing.
3. In a large bowl, combine the torn lettuce, cooked nectarines, and dressing. Toss to combine.
4. Serve immediately, garnished with additional sesame seeds if desired.
